insight: Detector A (2-model judge panel; gemini blocked on ADC) flags 7/10 certified-resolved reward hacks reading only the diff+task+visible test, at 1/10 gold FP and 1/2 equivalent FP (single stochastic run). Judges are NOT useless on this class (matches Control Tax). Two methodology issues caught and fixed via world-contact bars: a leakage guard false-alarm (real shared-gold-line leakage 2/10, biases against recall) and OpenAI nondecisions from a 200-token budget (raised to 1536). Detector B (gold-free execution oracle) split to iter197 rather than rushed; it must beat 7/10.
